auth service user creation and deletion administration
basic service travel query orchestration across station, train, route and price services
basic service station existence and id lookup
basic service authority and cors configuration surface
cancel service order cancellation flow across order, order-other, payment and user services

candidateCovers.label: cross-service authority and cors configuration comparison surface (basic-service permit-all path versus cancel-service role-gated path)
cancel service order cancellation and refund calculation measurement surface, joined via the shared private refund-calculation helper

notes: Interface declares a single getToken method; no additional predicates beyond the signature.
Interface declares four user-management method signatures.
Login flow: verification-code check, credential authentication, user lookup, token issuance.
A local variable declared as a boolean named id actually holds the verification-passed result from the verification-code service response.
saveUser method body is an unconditional null return.
The validation exception thrown by checkUserCreateInfo is caught and logged inside createDefaultAuthUser, then the method proceeds to save the user regardless.
Bootstrap class; RestTemplate bean is LoadBalanced, tying the service-name strings used in service calls elsewhere to client-side discovery.

basicservice path is permitAll; catch-all rule requires an authenticated principal with no specific role. requiresAuthentication is used as a catalog-external predicate since no listed authority predicate names a generic authenticated-principal gate.
Four endpoints surveyed, including a trivial welcome route.
Interface declares three travel/station query methods.
Largest file in this chunk; surveyed every public method plus the private provider-call helpers.
Three of four route/price lookup helpers branch on status==0 before returning null; the fourth (single route+type price lookup) converts the response body without checking status.
Exception branch of the distance-based price computation falls back to hardcoded price strings 95.0/120.0.
Config file: service name and nacos discovery address; controllerPackage property ties to the shared SwaggerConfig in ts-common.
Same bootstrap shape as ts-basic-service; LoadBalanced RestTemplate bean.
cancelservice path requires ADMIN or USER role, contrasting with the permitAll posture on the basicservice path reviewed in this same chunk.
cancelTicket endpoint catches all exceptions and still returns response status 1 on that branch, carrying the string 'error' as message.
Single-field DTO; not referenced by CancelServiceImpl or CancelController within this chunk's import statements.
Three-field result DTO; not referenced within this chunk's other cancel-service sources. Account is imported twice (duplicate import lines).
Single-field DTO; not referenced within this chunk's other cancel-service sources.
Interface declares cancelOrder and calculateRefund methods.
Reviewed cancelOrder, calculateRefund, sendEmail, drawbackMoney, getAccount and their private call-site helpers.
cancelOrder permits NOTPAID/PAID/CHANGE order status; calculateRefund permits only NOTPAID/PAID, a narrower set on the same enum.
getAccount's parameter is declared as orderId but the call site passes the order's accountId value.

Authorization header is forwarded to downstream calls only when present on the incoming request; forwardsAuthorizationHeader used as a catalog-external predicate since no listed authority predicate names header propagation.
Config file: service name and nacos discovery address; controllerPackage property ties to the shared SwaggerConfig in ts-common.
controllerPackage is injected per service via the swagger.controllerPackage property observed in both application.yml files in this chunk.
